name: /risk-classify: emitted yaml passes shape validation (use_case, classification, obligations, source_framework)
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/risk-classify.sh" --use-case credit-scoring --emit "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-risk-classification-yaml.sh" "$PWD/compliance/risk-classification.yaml" && echo ok 1>&2
